channel.title: Home on Mr.UNIX's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Home on Mr.UNIX's Blog

item.title: My First Post
item.description: This is just a test, I’ll post more later.

item.title: About
item.description: Hi! I’m an 18 years old computer nerd and a renewable energies student, I’m not really an expert in anything but I like to learn new stuffs and gain knowledge whenever I can. Interests: Linux/BSD system administration Cybersecurity Programming Digital Privacy Low level details of computer software and hardware DIY Electronics
